intro.title: Labs
intro.lead: The workshop. Free, browser-first tools I build on weekends — private by design, no sign-up, nothing uploaded. Selected experiments from UtpalDasLabs, live for anyone to use.

tools.name: Retailor
tools.tagline: Tailor your CV to any job with the AI you already use.
tools.description: Put your CV in, copy a ready-made prompt into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini or Perplexity along with the job advert, paste the reply back, review every suggested change side by side, and download a polished PDF. Runs entirely in your browser — no sign-up, no upload, no tracking.
tools.coverCaption: browser-only · bring your own AI · PDF out
